PublicationRequest.Description: Request for SCSO bus fares for line 1046

CompositeFrame.Name: Fares for SCSO SCSO:PK0002571:21:46
CompositeFrame.Description: SCSO SCSO:PK0002571:21:46 is accessible as a single trip fare. Prices are given zone to zone, where each zone is a linear group of stops, i.e. fare stage.

Codespace.Description: European Passenger Information profile data -use for UK frame names
UK National Public Transport Access Nodes: Stops.

Address.Street: The Bus Station, Southgate, Chichester PO19 2DQ

ServiceFrame.Description: This frame contains the stop and line definitions for the service. It could also be exchanged separately.

PreassignedFareProduct.Name: Single
PreassignedFareProduct.Description: One single ticket for one journey between the points shown on the ticket

TypeOfTravelDocument.Name: Stored on your mobile phone as m-tickets
